notes: Wizard step 2 (speaker picker): finer scrolling. Adds a signed rotationFine counter to encoder.h that ticks once per raw Seesaw transition (vs rotationNet, which only ticks once per tpd raw transitions = once every ~4 physical clicks on this encoder family). Picker now uses rotationFine, so each tick of the knob advances the highlight at the hardware's finest reportable resolution — half the felt-click count as before. Two-speaker list now navigates in ~2 physical clicks per item instead of ~4. Exposed via /api/status as rotationFine; also zeroed by /api/rotnet/reset.
